APPEARANCES:
Eileen D. Boussina, Esq., EDRINGTON, SCHIRMER & MURPHY, The Terraces, 2300 Contra Costa Blvd., Suite 450, Pleasant Hill, CA 94523-3936, (925) 827-3300, on behalf of defendant and moving party Faalele King.
Craig M. Hunt, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF CRAIG M. HUNT, PO Box 47311, San Francisco, CA 94123, (415) 389-0974, on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Alison Bing.

RULING:
Plaintiff stipulated to the tentative ruling: DEFENDANT FAALELE KING'S MOTION To Set Aside Default: GRANTED, no opposition timely filed. Opposition filed on 9/13/04: only 7 days before the hearing. Per CCP 1005(b), all opposition papers must be filed and served at least 10 days before the hearing; in this case, Friday, 9/10/04. Order signed in Court. Honorable James L. Warren. Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558 (301)
